title: Biolistic Transformation of Eutreptiella gymnastica and Pyramimonas parkeae Using Gene Gun
author: Anna Vanclová and Vladimír Hampl
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ibvcan6

steps.title: Approximately 1-5 × 10 6 cells of E
steps.instruction: Approximately 1-5 × 10 6 cells of E. gymnastica and P. parkeae and 1-5 × 10 8 cells of B. natans were used for the experiment

steps.title: Thick cell suspensions were layered on...
steps.instruction: Thick cell suspensions were layered on agar plates just prior to the experiment.

steps.title: Each sample was bombarded by gold...
steps.instruction: Each sample was bombarded by gold particles coated with 5 μg of plasmid DNA with organism-specific upstream and downstream region, antibiotic resistance gene and gene for firefly lucipherase (Eutre-PACLUC, Pyr-G418LUC, Bigelo-G418LUC) labelled by fluorescein using Label IT system (Mirus).

steps.title: Two separate experiments were performed on E
steps.instruction: Two separate experiments were performed on E. gymnastica and P. parkeae using 1 μm and 0.6 μm particles, respectively. Only 0.6 μm particles were used on B. natans because of its small size.

steps.title: Particles were delivered by PDS-1000/He (Bio-Rad)...
steps.instruction: Particles were delivered by PDS-1000/He (Bio-Rad) on 1250 psi, with 6 cm distance between the macrocarrier and the plate.

steps.title: Cells were transferred to fresh media...
steps.instruction: Cells were transferred to fresh media immediately after the particle bombardment.

steps.title: DNA, DNA-coated particles and DNA-treated cells...
steps.instruction: DNA, DNA-coated particles and DNA-treated cells were kept in dark as much as possible to minimize the loss of fluorescence.

steps.title: The cultures were left undisturbed for...
steps.instruction: The cultures were left undisturbed for several hours before the addition of antibiotics (10 μg/ml puromycin in case of E. gymnastica , 400 μg/ml geneticin in case of P. parkeae and B. natans ).

steps.title: 1 ml worth of cells from...
steps.instruction: 1 ml worth of cells from each sample was fixated by 1% formaldehyde and mounted onto microscopic slide with Vectashield medium.

steps.title: After this step, the cells were...
steps.instruction: After this step, the cells were cultivated for 14 days in normal conditions (18-20°C, 12 hour light cycle).
